3075790.name: Duck!
3075790.description:
Duck! is a clicker game, in which you grow your collection of Ducks by receiving a new Duck every few hours!
We've got all kinds of Ducks! Try to collect them all! Quack!

This game features:

Ducks!
Even more Ducks!
...they have been quacking in our storage for so long that it's getting annoying, so we are just giving them away!!! (Please just take them)

Grow your collection of Ducks and become the Quack Master!
3075790.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
